vocab.meaning: có vẻ ngoài phù hợp với tính chất/đẳng cấp
vocab.example: I adore executive sedans because they really look the part when you pull up to a formal business meeting.

vocab.meaning: đứng ngay vị trí thứ hai (suýt soát)
vocab.example: While I’m a fan of sports cars, a sturdy SUV is a close second due to its practicality for family trips.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí tiên phong/hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: I'm keen on electric vehicles that are at the cutting edge of sustainable transport technology.
Vintage Mercedes models appeal to me because their design and engineering truly stand the test of time.

vocab.meaning: trở thành tâm điểm chú ý/nổi bật nhất
vocab.example: At any auto exhibition, the limited-edition supercars always steal the show with their futuristic looks.

vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (sự thay đổi tích cực)
vocab.example: The new wave of minimalist interior designs in modern cars is a breath of fresh air compared to the cluttered dashboards of the past.

vocab.meaning: là phần thiết yếu/không thể tách rời
vocab.example: High maintenance costs are part and parcel of owning a high-end Italian sports car, but it's worth it for the thrill.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với mục đích sử dụng
vocab.example: I prefer hatchbacks because they are perfectly fit for purpose when navigating narrow, congested city streets.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ ấn tượng/tuyệt vời (tiếng lóng hiện đại)
vocab.example: The performance specs on the latest Tesla models are absolutely off the hook; I’ve never seen acceleration like that.
I like cars that can keep pace with the rapid advancements in smart connectivity and autonomous features.
